mapper.insert: INSERT INTO after_sales_operation_log ( after_sales_id, after_sales_no, operator_id, operator_role, operation_type, from_status, to_status, operation_detail, created_at ) VALUES ( #{afterSalesId}, #{afterSalesNo}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorRole}, #{operationType}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{operationDetail}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, operator_id, operator_role, operation_type, from_status, to_status, operation_detail, created_at FROM after_sales_operation_log WHERE after_sales_id = #{afterSalesId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, after_sales_id, after_sales_no, operator_id, operator_role, operation_type, from_status, to_status, operation_detail, created_at FROM after_sales_operation_log WHERE after_sales_no = #{afterSalesNo} ORDER BY created_at DESC
